mapper.select: SELECT FATH_TRANSAC_ID, SLS_CMPC_CD, RETV_CD_VAL, CUST_NM, CUST_IDFY_NO, ISS_DATE_VAL, DRIVE_LICNS_NO, MBL_IDCARD_QR_IMG, IDCARD_CONF_WAY, DIST_RSRTN_YN, FATH_PROGR_STEP_CD, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT, FATH_URL_RQT_DT, FATH_RESLT_CD, FATH_RESLT_SBST, FATH_RQTR_ID FROM NMCP_FATH_RESLT_PUSH WHERE FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId} AND SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_FATH_RESLT_PUSH WHERE FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId})
mapper.update: /* FathMapper.updateFathTransacId */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST SET FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId}, CPNT_ID = #{cpntId}, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT = '', RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo}
mapper.select: SELECT T1.CSTMR_TYPE ,CASE WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN T3.MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE /* 미성년자*/ ELSE T2.SELF_CERT_TYPE END AS SELF_CERT_TYPE ,T1.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,CASE WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN T3.MINOR_AGENT_NAME /* 미성년자*/ ELSE T2.CSTMR_NAME END AS CSTMR_NAME ,CASE WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN T3.MINOR_AGENT_RRN /* 미성년자*/ WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NA' THEN T2.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN /* 내국인*/ ELSE T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN /* 외국인*/ END AS CSTMR_RRN ,FATH_MOBILE_FN || FATH_MOBILE_MN || FATH_MOBILE_RN AS FATH_TEL_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST T1 ,MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR T2 ,MCP_REQUEST_AGENT T3 WHERE T1.REQUEST_KEY = T2.REQUEST_KEY AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = T3.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND T1.RES_NO = #{resNo}

SELECT CHG.CSTMR_TYPE ,CASE WHEN CHG.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN AGT.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE /* 미성년자*/ ELSE CHG.SELF_CERT_TYPE END AS SELF_CERT_TYPE ,'1100011741' AS CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,CASE WHEN CHG.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN AGT.NEE_AGENT_NAME /* 미성년자*/ ELSE CHG.CSTMR_NAME END AS CSTMR_NAME ,CASE WHEN CHG.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN AGT.NEE_AGENT_RRN /* 미성년자*/ ELSE CHG.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END AS CSTMR_RRN ,NVL(CHG.FATH_TEL_NO, CHG.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN || CHG.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN || CHG.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN) AS FATH_TEL_NO FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG CHG ,NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT AGT WHERE CHG.CUST_REQ_SEQ = AGT.CUST_REQ_SEQ(+) AND MCN_RES_NO = #{resNo}
mapper.update: /* FathMapper.updateSelfCertInfo */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR SET SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo})

/* FathMapper.updateSelfCertInfoMinor */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_AGENT SET MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo})

/* FathMapper.updateNameChgFathTransacId */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG SET FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId}, CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG = 'Y', MCN_STATE_CODE = '02', RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* FathMapper.updateNameChgComplete */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG SET FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT = #{fathCmpltNtfyDt}, MCN_STATE_CODE = '03', RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* FathMapper.updateNameChgSelfCertInfoMinor */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT SET NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = (SELECT CUST_REQ_SEQ FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo})

/* FathMapper.updateNameChgSelfCertInfo */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG SET SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = 'SELF', RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo}
